composition.tagline: Set up your church in four simple steps.
composition.cta: Your church is ready — turn every sermon into social posts, devotionals and more.
composition.title: Get your church set up

beats.caption: Welcome to ivangel
beats.narration: Welcome to ivangel. Setting up your church takes just four simple steps — and it starts with what makes you, you: your voice.

beats.label: Step 01 · Your church
beats.caption: Tell us about your church
beats.narration: First, tell ivangel about your church — its name, location, and the vision that drives everything you do.

beats.label: Step 02 · Your voice online
beats.caption: We learn from your website
beats.narration: ivangel reads your website to understand how your church already speaks — your tone, your values, and your story.

beats.label: Step 03 · Your sermons
beats.caption: Upload your recent sermons
beats.narration: Next, upload at least seven recent sermons. These are the clearest window into your church's authentic voice.

beats.label: Step 04 · Your voice profile
beats.caption: ivangel learns your voice
beats.narration: ivangel brings it all together, crafting a personalised style guide that sounds genuinely like you.

beats.label: Step 04 · Your voice profile
beats.caption: Your voice profile, ready to review
beats.narration: In moments it's ready. Review your style guide, make any tweaks you like, then accept to finish setup.

beats.caption: Welcome to ivangel
beats.narration: And that's it — your church is set up and ready to go. Welcome to ivangel.
